1.Name: Specialty Scare Actor
1.Desc:
<color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability</color>
When there's at least 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Anomaly</color> character in your squad: When an <color=#FFFFFF>Active Skill</color> is used, there is a 60% chance for that instance to deal 40% increased DMG.
